metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan Splunk for new indexes

elements.label: Hostname
elements.tooltip: Splunk server hostname or IP address

elements.label: Port
elements.tooltip: Splunk management REST API port. Default: 8089 (on-prem). Splunk Cloud uses 443.

elements.label: Use SSL / HTTPS
elements.tooltip: Enable HTTPS for all API calls. Always enabled for Splunk Cloud. Recommended for on-prem.

elements.label: Splunk Cloud
elements.tooltip: Enable Splunk Cloud mode. Forces port 443 and SSL. Use bearer token authentication.

elements.label: Disable SSL Certificate Verification
elements.tooltip: Skip SSL certificate verification. For self-signed certificates only. Do NOT enable in production.

elements.label: Username
elements.tooltip: Splunk username. Used with password authentication. Leave blank when using an auth token.

elements.label: Password
elements.tooltip: Splunk password. Dremio obtains a session key via the Splunk auth API.

elements.label: Auth Token (optional)
elements.tooltip: Bearer token for authentication. Takes priority over username/password. Use for Splunk Cloud JWT tokens or on-prem tokens created under Settings → Tokens.

elements.label: Default Earliest Time
elements.tooltip: Splunk relative time modifier for unfiltered scans (no WHERE _time clause). Prevents full-index scans on large deployments. Examples: -1h, -7d, -30d@d.

elements.label: Default Max Events Per Query
elements.tooltip: Maximum events returned per query when no LIMIT is specified. Splunk silently truncates at this value. Default: 50000.

elements.label: Sample Events For Schema Inference
elements.tooltip: Number of recent events to sample per index to infer column names and types. Higher values are more accurate but slower. Default: 200.

elements.label: Metadata Cache TTL (seconds)
elements.tooltip: How long to cache index list and inferred schemas. Set to 0 to always fetch fresh. Default: 300.

elements.label: Index Exclude Pattern (regex)
elements.tooltip: Java regex for Splunk indexes to hide from Dremio. Default hides Splunk internal indexes.

elements.label: Index Include Pattern (regex)
elements.tooltip: Optional Java regex. When set, only matching indexes appear in Dremio.

elements.label: Search Mode
elements.tooltip: Splunk search mode: normal (balanced, default), fast (disables field extraction, faster), verbose (all fields, slower).

elements.label: Results Page Size
elements.tooltip: Number of events per results page when paginating through job results. Default: 5000.

elements.label: Read Timeout (seconds)
elements.tooltip: HTTP read/socket timeout. Increase for large or slow queries. Default: 300.
